messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: make a ui with hello wolrd rainbows
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "make a ui with hello wolrd rainbows",
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down: capture requirements, create visual mockup, scaffold project, implement core UI, apply rainbow styling/animation, then test and deploy.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "define-requirements",
      "title": "Define requirements",
      "description": "Document exact functional and visual requirements for a UI that displays a \"Hello World\" message with rainbow styling and any animations.",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A one-page requirements note exists specifying text content, target platforms, colors/animations, and accessibility expectations."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-design-mockup",
      "title": "Create design mockup",
      "description": "Produce a static mockup (image or HTML prototype) showing layout, typography, and rainbow color treatment for the Hello World UI.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-requirements"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Mockup shows final placement of the message, color palette for the rainbow, and a notes section describing animation behavior."
    },
    {
      "id": "setup-project-scaffold",
      "title": "Set up project scaffold",
      "description": "Initialize project repository, install tooling (build system, dev server), and create base files (index.html, styles, main JS/TS).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-design-mockup"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Repository with working dev server that serves index.html and a starter CSS/JS bundle is created and runnable locally."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-ui-components",
      "title": "Implement UI components",
      "description": "Build the HTML/CSS/JS components that render the Hello World message and support injecting styling classes for rainbow effects.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project-scaffold"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "Hello World text renders in the app with correct semantics and is targetable by CSS/JS for styling and animation."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-rainbow-styling",
      "title": "Add rainbow styling and animation",
      "description": "Create and apply CSS (or JS-driven) gradients/animations to produce a rainbow effect across the text or background per the design.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-ui-components"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Rainbow colors are applied and animate smoothly at target framerate; design mockup color stops and timing are matched."
    },
    {
      "id": "test-and-polish",
      "title": "Test and polish",
      "description": "Perform cross-browser checks, accessibility audit (contrast/ARIA), responsive adjustments, and fix visual/interaction bugs.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "add-rainbow-styling"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All major browsers render correctly, accessibility issues addressed (contrast >= WCAG AA where applicable), and no visual glitches remain."
    },
    {
      "id": "deploy-publish",
      "title": "Deploy and publish",
      "description": "Build production assets and deploy the UI to a hosting platform or shareable URL for review.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "test-and-polish"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A public URL is available serving the production build and the deployed page matches the tested local version."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7
}
